title: Executive Regulation of the Oman Personal Data Protection Law
title_ar: اللائحة التنفيذية لقانون حماية البيانات الشخصية
official_title: Executive Regulation of the Personal Data Protection Law, Ministerial Decision No. 34/2024
official_title_ar: اللائحة التنفيذية لقانون حماية البيانات الشخصية الصادرة بالقرار الوزاري رقم 34/2024
citation: Executive Regulation of the Personal Data Protection Law, Ministerial Decision No. 34/2024
summary: The operational regulation under Oman's data protection law, issued by the Ministry of Transport, Communications and Information Technology. It details consent mechanics, sensitive data permit procedures and fees, breach notification timelines, data subject request handling, and transfer conditions, with a one year compliance window for existing processing.
impact_note: This regulation started the real compliance clock in Oman: existing controllers had one year from its entry into force to align, ending in February 2025. The permit route for sensitive data processing now has defined procedures and fees, breach notification has fixed timelines, and data subject requests have response deadlines, so paper policies need to become operating procedures. Entities serving Oman from abroad should reassess transfer arrangements against the regulation's conditions.

obligations.description: Align existing processing operations with the law and regulation
Notify the ministry of breaches within the regulation's timeline and inform affected data subjects
Apply for permits before processing sensitive data categories, following the defined procedure and fees

applicability.penalties: Administrative penalties under the law's framework
applicability.grace_period: One year for existing processing, ended 5 February 2025

notes: Confirm the decision date, gazette issue, exact effective date, and breach notification timeline against the qanoon.om text before publishing; dates here follow secondary reporting.
